idea-plugin.name: Umber
idea-plugin.description:
Warm, earthy themes that are easy on your eyes all day.

Seven Variants

  • Espresso — Rich brown, coffee and mahogany (#332c25)
  • Charcoal — Warm grey, stone and driftwood (#2d2a27)
  • Olive — Olive green, moss and earth (#282f22)
  • Light — Warm beige, parchment and linen (#f5f0e8)
  • Ivory — Bright, gentle warmth like morning light (#faf8f3)
  • Parchment — Old book paper, quiet and neutral (#f7f5f0)
  • Cream — Soft yellow warmth, afternoon sun (#f8f7f2)

Islands UI Native

Full support for JetBrains Islands UI (2025.3+) with rounded islands, transparent borders, and contrast window backgrounds. Same plugin works on classic UI (2024.3+) with no visual regression.

Design

  • Muted keywords that don't compete with your code
  • Soft accent color (#6699CC) for functions and links
  • Warm, low-fatigue backgrounds across all UI surfaces
  • Light variants use background highlighting instead of text color for syntax

Contrast & Accessibility

  • Dark variants — text 9.5:1, strings 7.2:1, numbers 6.8:1, functions 10.5:1 against background
  • Light variants — text 12.8:1, comments 5.2:1 against background
  • Keywords and comments intentionally muted (~3.8:1 in dark) to reduce visual noise — still above the 3:1 large-text threshold
  • Colorblind-safe — palette uses blue vs warm/amber axis, errors indicated by underlines not color alone

Tuned for TypeScript and Go, with solid defaults for JSON, YAML, CSS, HTML, and Markdown.

Also available for Ghostty terminal.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.3.0

  • Native Islands UI support (JetBrains 2025.3+) — rounded islands, transparent borders, MainWindow contrast backgrounds
  • Backward compatible — same ZIP works on 2024.3+ classic UI with no visual regression
  • Added marketing materials and code snippets for showcase screenshots

0.2.0

  • Rebalanced dark variant backgrounds for better perceptual spacing from Charcoal
  • Added three new light variants: Ivory, Parchment, Cream
  • Fixed blue-tinted syntax backgrounds in light theme (now warm honey/sand/beige)

1.0.0

  • Initial release with four variants: Espresso, Charcoal, Olive, Light
